reviews.review_description: This game was just a little creepy. It had a couple of jump scares but overall ok game. I beat it in about 45 minutes though. It had an unexpected ending. I would recommend if you have an hour to spare.
Enjoyed but far to short also took ages to load up

I haven't finished to play it, not yet but i must admit there are good suspense elements that make you a couple of goosebumps, if you work better in such elements like the ghostly figures and the interaction with the scenery you will have a very scary game that will make every horor game fan to love it!, try to make the feel of more real ghosts and it will not feel like a haunted house walk-in game, you will feel inside a really  haunted and eerie in! Eheh

When you first arrive at eerie inn there is no inn there's just a cellar and a blank building tried uninstalling and reinstalling but that didn't work I'm using a Galaxy S8.


Thanks for the response that definitely fixed the problem. The game is great pretty creepy and some decent jump scares keep up the good work!

The graphics ok. Great ppuzzles. Nice music. Language not very dificult to understand " i'm spanish" but i think that the game is too short. I expected more stages. I will buy your new game sure. Thanks. But too short. Remember. for that I only give you 4 stars. And i will appreciate spanish subtitles for new game

Game is advertised as supporting the gamepad. You'd get the impression it means you can move with the left thumbstick and rotate with the right. What it actually means is that you can hold the left trigger to move forward. That's it. That's the extent of the "gamepad support". On top of having some of the ugliest graphics I have ever seen in VR, the fake gamepad support was a major disappointment.

reviews.review_title: Not bad, but needs something updating
reviews.review_description: Upon reaching the inn in the game, I am invited to a scene where I can't see the building at all. Just a void in the scene where it's supposed to be. That was a bit disheartening to see.. after that, however, it seemed to run relatively smooth, with only little glitches here and there. Also, there is no clear idea at some points what to get or what to do. Ot would be nice to be given slight hints here and there. I wandered around during the night trying to figure what to do and couldn't figure it out. Maybe slight vocal prompts from the main character? The voice acting is pretty good, and there are some legitimately good jump scares. Just needs to be optimized for the Oculus Go I think.

developer_response.body:
Hi RT_thebeast,
We've just pushed out an update to fix the issue you reported. Thanks for playing The Eerie Inn!

reviews.review_description: Had a great time playing this. Love these type of games
Iam loving this game yall did a great job and hope to see more
very nice game but am stuck, where do I find the safe code L6 R2????????.

developer_response.body:
SPOILERS

Hey Alex,
You can figure out the combination by trial and error. So try L6-R2-L1. If this fails, try L6-R2-L2 (Which will work), then try L6-R2-L2-R1 and so on, until the safe opens.
Thanks for trying out our game!

reviews.review_description:
Good game and it has scared me a few times. However I found a flaw that you need to fix so I can finish the game. I was in the attic and went down the elevator. Apparently I was not completely in the elevator. When I get to the bottom floor, I cannot exit the elevator or go back up. I can open the other side of the elevator but cannot move forward. I can walk around some but it is white and I can see the lab in the distance.


I updated the app and I am still outside the elevator and unable to open the back gate to get to the other side of the elevator.

This game is dope!! I'm just stuck right now..I found the keys to open the upstairs room door but I'm lost to what to do next..please help lol overall I'm lovin it so far

       Update: I finished the game & I loved it!! Hope you guys make a sequel

developer_response.body:
SPOILER ALERT
Hi Necia921,
Inside the wardrobe in one of the rooms upstairs there is a hidden compartment. You will have to figure out a way to open it. 
Thanks so much for playing our game!

reviews.review_description: This game is alot like dark days not as polished but fun and voice acting is great.a must have because seems like not enough of these escape story based games are getting made for the go/gear vr.very good game
Seems to have potential but keep freezing on me

reviews.review_title: Bug on S9 has now been fixed
reviews.review_description: Thanks to the Developers as now the game will load on my S9 device. Havent had much time to try the game out as yet but will do shortly and will re-rate this review as appropriate.  Rated it from 1 to 3  Star as developers have fixed the problem promptly. Now looking forward to playing the game.

The game is really good  i haven't beat the game yet but I have watched gameplay before i bought it. My complaint right now is when you first get to the outside of the inn. There is no building there at all it's glitched out at that part. Is there a way to fix this???!!!!!! Please give me a response thank you

developer_response.body:
Hi donvr81,
We've just pushed out an update to fix the issue you reported. Thanks for playing The Eerie Inn!

reviews.review_description:
Wish there were sequels 😊
and shorter loading times.

Installed yesterday..so still new, some good scares/jumps which is always good lol.
Only gripe- dialogue is like a stuck record at times.. :/

I like this game personally, cute little story and it has fun puzzles. It was also strategic in some ways because you most definitely have to use your brain. It doesn’t get you all frustrated like some of these complicated ones and you will make it to the end. Short and sweet. Enjoy!

This is a really good game, and i would like to see more like it, only could we make it a lot longer, was way to short. only took me about 30 mins to finish it. The jump scares made it really great. congrats on that.  one of the puzzles was a little strange, never would have figured to use that for a shower head repair. but ok.

thanks for a really good game.

Sincerely DragonWizard
